tasks.title: Version canonical graph schema
acceptance: JSON schema defines project, nodes, ports, edges, evidence and provenance
Round-trip fixtures preserve every field
v1 migration and compatibility policy documented

tasks.title: Build Python and TypeScript static scanners
acceptance: Extract files, symbols, imports and calls from fixtures
Malformed files yield diagnostics without aborting scan
Generated/vendor/secret paths are excluded

tasks.title: Replace heuristics with configurable classification rules
acceptance: Layer and piece rules support defaults plus project overrides
Every classification carries confidence and reason
Unknown items remain visible and actionable

tasks.title: Add search, filters, focus and minimap
acceptance: Search focuses matching nodes
Layer/kind toggles update graph
Minimap and fit-to-selection work with keyboard

tasks.title: Scale renderer with clustering and instancing
acceptance: 5k-node fixture remains interactive
Clusters expand/collapse deterministically
Labels use level-of-detail

tasks.title: Harden privacy, accessibility and snapshot workflow
acceptance: No file body or secret path leaves browser
Snapshot import/export includes provenance
Keyboard, contrast and reduced motion checks pass

tasks.title: Define typed visual operations
acceptance: Create, delete, move, rename and connect operations are schema-valid
Operations are serializable and reversible
Domain layer has no renderer dependency

tasks.title: Implement snap and compatibility engine
acceptance: Compatible ports snap with visible feedback
Invalid connections explain the violated rule
Keyboard assembly is supported

tasks.title: Compile operations into deterministic change plans
acceptance: Same graph operation always produces same plan
Plan lists files, symbols, imports and tests impacted
No source file changes during planning

tasks.title: Add code templates and language adapters
acceptance: Python and TypeScript adapters implement create/rename/connect
Templates are project-overridable
Generated output formats cleanly

tasks.title: Build diff preview, validation and explicit apply
acceptance: Preview displays exact diff and impact
Apply requires explicit confirmation
Tests/build run and receipts are retained

tasks.title: Add checkpoints, undo and conflict recovery
acceptance: Every apply creates a checkpoint
Undo restores exact prior bytes
Concurrent disk changes stop apply with actionable conflict

tasks.title: Extract reusable canvas package
acceptance: Canvas mounts with injected graph/store APIs
No direct browser filesystem dependency
Web MVP consumes the package

tasks.title: Scaffold VS Code webview extension
acceptance: Command opens canvas for active workspace
Strict CSP and typed message protocol
Extension package builds locally

tasks.title: Synchronize editor and canvas selections
acceptance: Canvas selection opens exact symbol
Editor selection focuses matching piece
Missing/stale symbols degrade gracefully

tasks.title: Implement incremental workspace watcher
acceptance: Changed files rescan under 500ms warm
Graph state remains stable across refresh
Rename/delete events update edges

tasks.title: Guard extension apply service and package for Cursor
acceptance: Workspace trust and path boundaries enforced
Preview/apply/checkpoint works from webview
VSIX installs in VS Code and Cursor

tasks.title: Define AI intent and proposal contracts
acceptance: Intent, assumptions, operations, risks and evidence are typed
Model output cannot bypass operation validation
Provider interface supports local-first models

tasks.title: Build architecture explanation and impact assistant
acceptance: Answers cite graph nodes/edges
Uncertain claims are labeled
Impact analysis identifies affected tests and boundaries

tasks.title: Implement intent-to-graph proposal flow
acceptance: Natural-language request produces preview-only typed operations
User can accept/reject each operation
Invalid proposals never reach change planning

tasks.title: Generate tests and verify AI transformations
acceptance: Proposal includes tests before implementation
RED and GREEN evidence retained
Failed verification automatically rejects apply

tasks.title: Ship audit trail, onboarding and v1 release
acceptance: Every proposal/apply/undo is auditable
Guided sample teaches the visual grammar
Web and VSIX release artifacts pass full gates

tasks.title: Model hierarchical identity from project to symbol
acceptance: Graph IR represents project, layer, flow, file, class, function and method parentage
Every node and edge keeps stable identity across unchanged rescans
Static, runtime and AI-inferred evidence sources are distinguishable

tasks.title: Implement four-level semantic zoom
acceptance: Z0 shows projects, Z1 layers and flows, Z2 flow participants, Z3 files and symbols
Transitions morph in place with threshold hysteresis and preserve selection
Breadcrumb, minimap and URL state expose the current semantic path

tasks.title: Render typed imports, calls and reverse relations
acceptance: Imports, calls, implements, inherits, event, data, read, write and verifies use distinct arrows
Selecting a file lists direct imports and reverse importers with source evidence
Selecting a class lists methods, constructor dependencies, callers and tests

tasks.title: Turn arrow drawing and reversal into refactor proposals
acceptance: User can draw, reconnect or reverse a typed edge
Each action produces preview-only import/call/refactor operations
Architecture violations and cycles block apply with an explanation

tasks.title: Add file and symbol editing inside the canvas
acceptance: Double-click opens the exact file, class or method in an embedded editor
Saved edits incrementally reparse and update affected graph regions
Graph drag refactors and text edits share the same diff, validation and undo gates

tasks.title: Adapt the canvas shell to every viewport
acceptance: Phone portrait and landscape keep the canvas and primary actions usable
Tablet uses available space without desktop panel collisions
Desktop and ultrawide layouts keep readable panel widths
Viewport height, orientation and safe areas are handled
verify: browser proof at phone portrait, phone landscape, tablet and desktop resolutions
evidence: Browser measurements confirm no horizontal overflow and visible canvas at all four resolutions

tasks.title: Wrap Canvas in a VS Code-like workspace shell
acceptance: wesleysimplicio/simplicio-loop is the named default example
Activity bar exposes Explorer, Search, Source Control, Run and Extensions simulations
Canvas, editor terminal panel, tabs and status bar remain usable
Shell adapts to phone, tablet and desktop
verify: browser proof on desktop and phone
evidence: Desktop proof: activity bar 48px, explorer 216px, canvas 931px, inspector 245px, no overflow
Mobile proof: full-width 390px canvas, compact terminal, no overflow

tasks.title: Import a GitHub repository through a guarded local clone
acceptance: User can import either a local folder or a public GitHub repository URL
GitHub URL is strictly normalized before local clone
Clone is shallow and stored outside source-controlled application files
Local mapper analysis is attempted and its status is visible
Basic source analysis still loads when mapper is unavailable
verify: browser proof of GitHub import dialog and error/success state
evidence: 50 tests passing including 6 GitHub URL safety cases
Browser proof shows Open folder and GitHub entry paths with normalized default wesleysimplicio/simplicio-loop
Live backend restart was blocked by the already-running sandbox-owned Vite process; middleware loads on the next normal npm run dev start

tasks.title: Activate English Portuguese Spanish and Simplified Chinese UI locales
acceptance: English, Portuguese, Spanish and Simplified Chinese are selectable and switch core UI strings instantly
Eleven future locales remain visible but disabled with an availability hint
Locale selection persists locally and defaults to Portuguese for this MVP
Language names and controls remain readable on phone layouts
verify: browser proof for four active and eleven disabled locales
evidence: src/domain/i18n.ts exposes exactly 4 active and 11 disabled locales
Browser proof blocked in this sandbox by listen EPERM on 127.0.0.1:4173; no visual completion claim made

tasks.title: Guarantee browser GitHub import when the local bridge is unavailable
acceptance: Public GitHub repositories open from the browser without requiring a running local clone bridge
Fallback reads the repository tree and bounded text contents through GitHub public APIs
Local clone/Mapper remains preferred when available
Rate limits, missing files, binaries and oversized repositories produce actionable states
Folder import remains unchanged
verify: browser proof with a public repository and a local folder
